productDisplayName: ADIDAS Neo Men Court Evo Black Shoes
description: The Court Evo from adidas is a lifestyle shoe - a modern, lightweight reinterpretation of the humble sneaker. Crafted from the highest quality materials, the upper features stylish, understated perforation details on the classic 3-Stripes, giving an adidas twist that makes this shoe top our wish-list for the season! Class up your casual act with this stylish sneaker. Recommended for casual wear; looks best when worn with a matching leather jacket.UpperSynthetic upper with perforations for ventilation and comfortStrategically placed synthetic overlays and reinforced overlay on the heel for added shoe structureadidas Patented 3-Stripes on the midfoot for enhanced shoe structure and styleLace-up system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar and meshed tongue for snug fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortBranding on the tongue and at the back of the collarMidsoleRubber midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDot pattern grooves and a suction point at the toe for great tractionShoe careWipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust and dirtDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
